title: callitriche verna subvar. minima
intro: Callitriche verna subvar. minima, also known as small springwort, is a small aquatic plant species belonging to the Plantaginaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Callitriche verna subvar. minima include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting its active compounds with a solvent, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
